<insights>

- Isolated files — no import edges between 3 files, cohesion is unmeasurable (reported as 0)
- index.html is the Vite/build-tool entry point — changes here affect how the entire viewer bootstraps, including script injection and CSP meta tags
- The dual-logo pattern (lightmode/darkmode) should be driven by a CSS media query or a JS theme hook rather than hard-coded asset swaps, keeping the shell declarative
- These assets have cohesion 0 because the import graph cannot traverse binary PNGs; treat this zone as a structural grouping, not a code-quality signal
- Cohesion and coupling both report 0 because static binary assets (PNG) have no analysable import edges; the metrics are not meaningful for this zone and should not trigger quality alerts.
- index.html is the single Vite entry point for the entire viewer build; any script tag or meta change here affects all viewer routes — keep it minimal and delegate bootstrapping to the JS module graph.
- No cross-zone imports into or out of this zone confirms correct isolation of static assets from application logic.
